name: Yamatane Corporation
summary: Yamatane Corporation engages in the wholesale, import, and export of staple foods and foodstuffs in Japan. It also offers overseas moving, warehousing, harbor transport, customs clearance, cargo handling, packaging, worker dispatching, and freight forwarding services. In addition, the company designs, develops, and sells computer software and other information equipment; sells and leases computers; and offers real estate agency services, as well as casualty and life insurance. The company was formerly known as Yamatane Sangyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yamatane Corporation in 1995. Yamatane Corporation was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
